summary: Added conservative question/mark-scheme image path role mismatch detection to the current output-integrity audit.

files_changed.why: Added strong path-role inference and failure groups for question fields pointing at mark-scheme paths, and mark-scheme fields pointing at question paths.
Added a swapped-role fixture proving existing files still fail when assigned to the wrong image field.

test_results: Initial targeted pytest run failed as expected because role mismatches were not checked.
Final targeted pytest run passed: 13 passed.
Live output-integrity audit exited 1 due to existing suspicious dimensions; question_image_path_kind_mismatch_count and mark_scheme_image_path_kind_mismatch_count were both zero.
repo_hygiene_notes: No generated output or asset manifest was rewritten.
The live audit report was written under this run's iteration folder.
known_risks: This is a path-name heuristic, not visual content classification.
Paths containing both question and mark-scheme markers will be treated as mismatched for either role and should be reviewed.
